implementation_summary.summary: CP00-683 bridges the RP22 External Integrations I P06 test/golden tail, Hermes evidence packet, and Claude review packet head over 40 planned units from RP22.P06.M07.S07 through RP22.P06.M09.S02 while keeping runtime paths closed.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-683 RP22.P06.M07.S07-RP22.P06.M09.S02 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
